notes: Tightens Dashboard card alignment so each pillar carries its own metric inside the card.
Replaces the manual helper checklist data table with cleaner small-action rows and separate dates.
Simplifies routine repeat settings so the routine sets only the repeat pattern while activities set their own times.
Adds weekly repeat days immediately when Weekly is selected and supports monthly patterns such as first Monday or last Friday.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release: v0.6.29 Dashboard, helper checklist, and repeat refinement
release_name: Dashboard, helper checklist, and repeat refinement
release_notes: Refines Dashboard alignment, helper checklist input, and routine repeat settings including weekly and monthly recurrence patterns.
